mnemonics.title: OWASP IoT Top 10
mnemonics.content: Insecure Interfaces (II), Insufficient Auth (IA), Poor Crypto (PC), Insecure FW (IF), Privacy Issues (PI)

acronyms.usage: Used in CoAP for encrypted communication

visualTips.visualization: Imagine concentric rings: Device > Network > Cloud > Application layers

analogies.analogy: Like securing every door/window in a smart home - each device is an entry point
